ddls:
CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "wdp3" INTEGER /* WDP3 parameter value */,
  "wdp2" INTEGER /* WDP2 parameter value */,
  "wdp1" INTEGER /* WDP1 parameter value */,
  "wdp0" INTEGER /* WDP0 parameter value */,
  "wdt_oscillator_cycles" INTEGER /* Number of WDT oscillator cycles */,
  "typical_time_out" REAL /* Typical time-out at V = 5.0V */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier for the configuration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the configuration was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the configuration */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the configuration was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the configuration is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_wdp2 FOREIGN KEY ("wdp2") REFERENCES wdp2_values ("wdp2_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_wdp1 FOREIGN KEY ("wdp1") REFERENCES wdp1_values ("wdp1_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_wdp3 FOREIGN KEY ("wdp3") REFERENCES wdp3_values ("wdp3_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_wdp0 FOREIGN KEY ("wdp0") REFERENCES wdp0_values ("wdp0_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wdp3_values" (
  "wdp3_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each WDP3 value */,
  "wdp3_value" INTEGER /* Value of WDP3 parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of WDP3 value */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the value is a default setting */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the value is deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wdp3_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wdp2_values" (
  "wdp2_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each WDP2 value */,
  "wdp2_value" INTEGER /* Value of WDP2 parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of WDP2 value */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the value is a default setting */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the value is deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wdp2_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wdp1_values" (
  "wdp1_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each WDP1 value */,
  "wdp1_value" INTEGER /* Value of WDP1 parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of WDP1 value */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the value is a default setting */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the value is deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wdp1_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wdp0_values" (
  "wdp0_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each WDP0 value */,
  "wdp0_value" INTEGER /* Value of WDP0 parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of WDP0 value */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the value is a default setting */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the value is deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wdp0_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wdt_oscillator_cycles" (
  "cycle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cycle value */,
  "cycle_value" INTEGER /* Value of WDT oscillator cycles */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of cycle value */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the cycle value is deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cycle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voltage_settings" (
  "voltage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voltage setting */,
  "voltage_value" REAL /* Value of voltage setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of voltage setting */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the voltage setting is the default */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the voltage setting is deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voltage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_out_values" (
  "time_out_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time-out value */,
  "time_out_value" REAL /* Value of time-out */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of time-out value */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the time-out value is deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_out_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of changes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, approved, deprecated) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who approved the version */,
  "approved_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_versions_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, technician, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the configuration */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the role is the default for new users */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the role is deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_wdp3" (
  "config_wdp3_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration */,
  "wdp3_id" INTEGER /* ID of the WDP3 value */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the relationship is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_wdp3_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_wdp3_wdp3_id FOREIGN KEY ("wdp3_id") REFERENCES wdp3_values ("wdp3_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_wdp3_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_wdp2" (
  "config_wdp2_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration */,
  "wdp2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the WDP2 value */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the relationship is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_wdp2_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_wdp2_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_wdp2_wdp2_id FOREIGN KEY ("wdp2_id") REFERENCES wdp2_values ("wdp2_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_wdp1" (
  "config_wdp1_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration */,
  "wdp1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the WDP1 value */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the relationship is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_wdp1_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_wdp1_wdp1_id FOREIGN KEY ("wdp1_id") REFERENCES wdp1_values ("wdp1_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_wdp1_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_wdp0" (
  "config_wdp0_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration */,
  "wdp0_id" INTEGER /* ID of the WDP0 value */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the relationship is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_wdp0_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_wdp0_wdp0_id FOREIGN KEY ("wdp0_id") REFERENCES wdp0_values ("wdp0_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_wdp0_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_cycles" (
  "config_cycles_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration */,
  "cycle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the WDT oscillator cycles */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the relationship is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_cycles_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_cycles_cycle_id FOREIGN KEY ("cycle_id") REFERENCES wdt_oscillator_cycles ("cycle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_cycles_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_voltages" (
  "config_voltages_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration */,
  "voltage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voltage setting */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the relationship is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_voltages_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_voltages_voltage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voltage_id") REFERENCES voltage_settings ("voltage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_voltages_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_time_outs" (
  "config_time_outs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration */,
  "time_out_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time-out value */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the relationship is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_time_outs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_time_outs_time_out_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_out_id") REFERENCES time_out_values ("time_out_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_time_outs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)
